features: 【OUT WITH ONE-WEEK MEDICINE】7 Day pill organiser allow you to take 1-week medicine when you are out. Each daily box can hold up to 8 fish oils or 10 large vitamins.
【EASY TO OPEN 】 Push open design medicine box, easy to open for the arthritis or elderly.
【NEVER WARE OFF 】This tablet box adopted UV printing technology, will never ware off for over 5,000 times of use.
【OVER ALL SIZE】8.8 x 2.1 x 1 inches, individual compartment size: 1.3 x 1.2 x 0.8 inches.
【BPA FREE】Fullicon large pill box organiser are made of food grade plastic, safe for medical use.
description: Product Description Fullicon - The Pill Management Expert Fullicon was first established in 2012 with a vision to help others to achieve healthier life. We believe managing your health should be an easy task in every way. We want to help you & your loved ones the right solution to achieve a better lifestyle. - A healthier life is a happier life Pill box 7 day 1 Times Portable Pill Box - 2 Times A Day PU Leather Portable Pill Box - 2 Times A Day Travel Pill Box - 3 times a Day Pill reminder box with alarm - 4 times a day SPINDO Pill Dispenser 7 Day Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.7 out of 5 stars 718 4.6 out of 5 stars 3,941 4.5 out of 5 stars 1,572 — 3.4 out of 5 stars 37 4.2 out of 5 stars 927 Price £5.99 £ 5 . 99 £8.49 £ 8 . 49 £8.99 £ 8 . 99 — no data — no data — no data Features Schedule Your multi vitamins One Day One Box Portable But Large Capacity with PU Leather Case New SECURE Buckle Design & Large Compartment Reminder alarm & Moisture Proof Design Load up all of your daily pills with a click of a button Vitamin Box Travel Pill Organiser - Black Stylish Small Pill Box Pill Cutter with Blade for All Shapes Portable Pill Box - 2 Times A Day Travel Pill Box - 3 times a Day SPINDO Pill Dispenser 7 Day Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 5,989 4.4 out of 5 stars 71 4.1 out of 5 stars 3,108 4.6 out of 5 stars 3,941 4.7 out of 5 stars 5,285 4.2 out of 5 stars 927 Price — no data — no data £7.49 £ 7 . 49 £8.49 £ 8 . 49 £8.49 £ 8 . 49 £29.99 £ 29 . 99 Features Jumbo 8 compartments , MOISTUREPROOF & AIRTIGHT DESIGN Small, Stylish, Quick Fill within minutes Accurate Cutting & Extremely Sharp Stainless Steel Blade Portable But Large Capacity New SECURE Buckle Design & Large Compartment Load up all of your daily pills with a click of a button
